texto: Rural places have hemorrhaged their best and brightest children, their intellectuals, thinkers, organizers, leaders, and artists-those who would create change and who would parent another generation of thinkers. All gone.Our seeds are disappearing.
explicacao: Citação de Janisse Ray sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “Rural places have hemorrhaged their best and brightest children, their intellectuals, thinkers, o…” articula lideranca, culture, ecology em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e ecology.
